summary.label: Working
summary.message: All supported Ghostify controls were proven working on June 27, 2026. The current working window restarted with the June 4 fix after May 29 breakage reports.

policy.verificationCadence: Reviewed after each release and after credible platform-change reports.
policy.staleBehavior: Verified live-platform statuses downgrade after expiresAt instead of staying green.

entries.reviewRecord: GH-IG-SEEN-001 reviewed working on 2026-06-27 for v2.0.4
entries.notes: Included in the June 27, 2026 maintainer smoke pass for Instagram Hide Seen.

entries.notes: Included in the June 27, 2026 maintainer smoke pass. Facebook may still make chats look read locally; sender-side Seen remains the proof target.

history.title: All supported controls proven working
history.summary: Maintainer smoke review confirmed the supported Instagram, Messenger, and Facebook controls working on v2.0.4. This is the popup proof date.

history.title: Fix launched and current working window restarted
history.summary: The fix shipped on June 4, 2026. From this date through June 27, 2026, the supported controls were treated as working again after daily maintainer verification.

history.title: Breakage verified and fix work started
history.summary: The May 29 reports were confirmed on June 2, 2026, and maintainer fix work started from that verified breakage.

history.title: Breakage reports received
history.summary: Credible reports said Ghostify had broken on supported Meta surfaces, ending the prior green window until the issue was verified and fixed.

history.title: Previous working window began
history.summary: Ghostify was proven working from February 28, 2026 through May 29, 2026, before the May 29 breakage reports.

provenWorking.summary: Verified working from February 28 through May 29, 2026; reports arrived on May 29; breakage was confirmed on June 2; the fix launched June 4; daily working verification resumed from June 4 through June 27, 2026.
